# Review Auth0 contract terms

## Goal
Scrutinize the contract terms of Auth0's Enterprise plan and verify the SLA, pricing, and data retention policy.

## Background
Auth0 was selected as the top candidate in the OAuth provider comparison, but a detailed review of the contract terms is incomplete. In particular, the data retention policy and cancellation terms need to be verified. Due date was 1/13 but this remains unaddressed.
